category_sources: Official GitHub README describes homeshick handling multiple dotfile repositories.
source_facts.description says Git dotfiles synchronizer written in bash.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository and README use homeshick.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README points users to the wiki for installation instructions, tutorials, tips, and tricks.
README is also an official quick-start documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/andsens/homeshick; per instruction, repo returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official GitHub repository topics include git, bash, and dotfile-manager.
